scenes.visual_note: Mira owl bounces in cheerfully with a friendly wave
scenes.subtitle_text: Hey there! Meet Mira, your diabetes sidekick.
scenes.voice_text: Hi! I'm Mira — your friendly owl who helps you understand your insulin and stay on top of things. Let me show you around!

scenes.visual_note: A colourful insulin curve draws itself like a roller coaster track
scenes.subtitle_text: This line shows when your insulin is working hardest.
scenes.voice_text: See this curve? It shows when your insulin is doing the most work — like a little energy wave through your day!

scenes.visual_note: A glowing shield forms around the data, amber highlights on edges
scenes.subtitle_text: Mira watches out for you, even when you're busy.
scenes.voice_text: Mira keeps an eye on things and lets you or your grown-up know if something needs attention. Like a safety shield!

scenes.visual_note: Dashboard tiles light up in a playful sequence
scenes.subtitle_text: Your own dashboard — everything in one place.
scenes.voice_text: Your dashboard shows your glucose, meals, and how you're doing. It's like your own mission control!

scenes.visual_note: Bright confetti burst with a star badge
scenes.subtitle_text: You're a star! Let's get started.
scenes.voice_text: Awesome — you're all set! Let's jump in and explore your dashboard together.
